chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 228 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 2929/2025. 07.11.2025. Mr. Sajid Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.4, 5 and 6. Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Counsel for the respondents No.4, 5 and 6 files a statement attaching certain documents which are taken on record and copy whereof supplied to learned A.P.G. It appears from the orders passed by this Court that the last appearance made by applicant on his behalf was on 28.07.2025. Subsequently none appeared on his behalf on 01.09.2025, 10.10.2025, 28.10.2025 and once again today. It appears that the applicant has lost his interest in pursuing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application. The counsel was also cautioned. In the circumstances, dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
